title: -y option is not working
body:
The -y option is very strangely not working for me, its probably a stupid mistake on my side, but I cant find it
```
iverilog -o /mnt/d/git/intfftk/sim_build/NFFT=7/int_fft_ifft_pair.vvp -D COCOTB_SIM=1 -g2012 -s int_fft_ifft_pair -Pint_fft_ifft_pair.NFFT=7 -s glbl -Y .v -y /mnt/d/git/intfftk/src/verilog/XilinxUnisimLibrary /mnt/d/git/intfftk/src/verilog/main/int_fft_ifft_pair.v /mnt/d/git/intfftk/src/verilog/fft/int_dif2_fly.v /mnt/d/git/intfftk/src/verilog/fft/int_dit2_fly.v /mnt/d/git/intfftk/src/verilog/fft/int_fftNk.v /mnt/d/git/intfftk/src/verilog/fft/int_ifftNk.v /mnt/d/git/intfftk/src/verilog/math/int_addsub_dsp48.v /mnt/d/git/intfftk/src/verilog/math/cmult/int_cmult_dsp48.v /mnt/d/git/intfftk/src/verilog/math/cmult/int_cmult18x25_dsp48.v
```
gives me this error
```
error: Unable to find the root module "glbl" in the Verilog source.
     : Perhaps ``-s glbl'' is incorrect?
```
Does anybody have an idea why it is not working? glbl.v is definately present 

```
benja@DESKTOP:/mnt/d/git/intfftk$ ls /mnt/d/git/intfftk/src/verilog/XilinxUnisimLibrary
glbl.v  unisims
benja@DESKTOP:/mnt/d/git/intfftk$
```
I am using version 11.0 (stable) installed via apt install in Ubuntu 22.
code_blocks:
error: Unable to find the root module "glbl" in the Verilog source.
     : Perhaps ``-s glbl'' is incorrect?
